docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ESCOBAR, NAPOLEON AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, FRANCISCO ,AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
